introSection: Dum-Dum is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Beto Carrero World in Penha, Santa Catarina, Brazil.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride follows the Big Apple / Wacky Worm layout. The track is painted yellow.

fullText:
Dum-Dum is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Beto Carrero World in Penha, Santa Catarina, Brazil.

The ride follows the Big Apple / Wacky Worm layout. The track is painted yellow.
